parameters.name: Location
parameters.description: Select from the drop-down or specify one of the following: - "me" - "SharePoint Site URL" - "users/someone's UPN" - "groups/group Id" - "sites/SharePoint Site URL:/teams/team name:" (colons are required).

parameters.name: Document Library
parameters.description: Select a document library from the drop-down.

parameters.name: File
parameters.description: Select a Word file through File Browse.

parameters.name: dynamicFileSchema
parameters.description: Dynamic Schema of items in selected File
